title: NEB OneTaq PCR
description: New England Biolabs OneTaq DNA Polymerase (M0480): 50 uL robust standard reaction with a 94 C denaturation and 68 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: New England Biolabs (NEB), OneTaq DNA Polymerase #M0480. Note OneTaq extends at 68 C (not 72 C). Buffer choice by GC content: <50% GC use Standard buffer (default); >65% GC use OneTaq GC Reaction Buffer plus 10-20% OneTaq High GC Enhancer. Annealing: 45-68 C based on the primer-pair Tm (NEB Tm Calculator, OneTaq setting; ~5 C below the lowest primer Tm). The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. Initial denaturation up to 2-4 min for high-GC templates. Source: https://www.neb.com/en-us/protocols/onetaqdnapolymerasem0480
